name: telegram-triage
title: Triage Receiver — Telegram callback verdict layer
planned: triage-receiver workflow builder — the generalized dual-auth (studio HMAC canary + Telegram bot-secret) callback receiver that PATCHes the pressed verdict back to the CALLER's own writeTable slot; not yet snapshotted here (closest shape is signed-webhook-base + outbound-verdict-callback)

triageKeyboard compose-side primitive — the helper a caller uses to emit the Telegram inline-button callback_data (<action>:<entity>:<id>) from the SAME buttons config the receiver's ACTION_MAP consumes (one source of truth, IN-30(B) skew structurally impossible); a compose-side helper, not a workflow snapshot
OWNS NO TABLE (SPEC §3 D-0) — v1 ships ZERO tmpl_ tables; it writes the caller's slot table (provisioned by the caller's brick), never a triage-owned template
